About Us

Built on trust and local expertise

Over a decade serving Irish landlords with clarity and care.

Our History

15 years of trusted management.

Founded in 2010, McCann & Curran began as a small lettings agency in Dublin with a simple belief: landlords deserve complete transparency and professional service.

Over the years, we expanded into full property management, developing our own secure digital client portal to give landlords real-time access to financial statements, compliance documents, and maintenance logs.

Today, we manage over 560 properties across Ireland, combining hands-on expertise with modern technology to deliver a management experience that is both personal and efficient.

What We Stand For

Values that guide everything we do.

Our culture is built on accountability, modern technology, and a genuine commitment to every landlord and tenant we serve.

Trust & Integrity

Honest communication and ethical practices form the foundation of every client relationship.

Transparency

Real-time access to reports and data. No hidden fees, no surprises — ever.

Excellence

The highest standards in tenant vetting, property care, and regulatory compliance.

Innovation

Our digital-first approach with secure portals sets us apart from traditional managers.

Client Focus

Dedicated account managers who treat your property as their own.

Partnership

We work alongside landlords as long-term partners, not just service providers.

Ready to simplify your property management?
